stemHtml: An aircraft flying IFR in visual meteorological conditions experiences a communications failure. What actions should be taken by the flight crew?

options.a: Return to the aerodrome of origin and try to establish communication with the air traffic services unit there.
options.b: Land at the nearest suitable aerodrome, if the flight can be continued in visual meteorological conditions.
options.c: Set the transponder code 7700 and maintain the last assigned speed and level for the next 5 minutes.
options.d: Set the transponder code to 7500 and descend to the area minimum altitude at the current position.
